items.title: OnTrac CEO Duffy leaves for UK pest control company
items.description: The CEO of Tier 2 parcel delivery company OnTrac has resigned to become the head of a pest control company based in England. The post OnTrac CEO Duffy leaves for UK pest control company appeared first on FreightWaves.

items.title: AI in Aviation Market Set to Hit USD 171.53 Billion by 2033, Driven by Predictive Maintenance and Flight Operations Optimization | Report by SNS Insider
items.author: Sns Insider
items.description: The global AI in Aviation Market is projected to grow from USD 8.63 billion in 2025 to USD 171.53 billion by 2033, with a CAGR of 45.33%. Key growth drivers include predictive maintenance, flight operations optimization, and passenger experience enhancement. The U.S. market alone is expected to expand from USD 2.43 billion to USD 37.51 billion. Machine learning and computer vision technologies are leading adoption, with airlines and airports investing heavily in AI-driven solutions for cost reduction and operational efficiency.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Airbus launched an AI-enabled A320 simulator in March 2025, demonstrating leadership in AI-integrated aviation training and expanding its portfolio in the rapidly growing AI aviation market.

Boeing introduced the 'Virtual Airplane Procedures Trainer' in November 2025 using Microsoft Azure, reinforcing its dominance in aviation training technology and positioning itself in the high-growth AI aviation sector.
